description:
Easy to use - One-touch cleaning button saves you time falling off. New Pet Hair Cleaner Brush Simply click the button to automatically release collected fallen hair. Combed hair can be easily pushed out of the bristles. Suitable for most hair types: dogs/cats with long, medium, short, thick, hairy or curly hair.

Magic Pet Comb - The Magic Pet Comb for Shedding gently removes loose hair and eliminates tangles, knots and trapped dirt without scratching your pet's skin. Eliminates loose undercoats and improves pet hygiene.

Upgraded PET Premium Cat Brush - Cat Grooming Brush Long or Short Hair Cats Dogs Pet Massage Brushes Curved needles penetrate deep into the undercoat for easy grip on loose hair. Prevent static electricity in pet hair and reduce messy fur in the home. Durable curved needles are stronger, less prone to deformation and can be used longer.

Massage Cleaning Cat Brush - This Pet Hair Cleaner Brush is specially designed. The round eco-friendly handle handle is simple and comfortable to hold. It is made of high-quality eco-friendly material ABS, which is very convenient to carry and durable to use. It is the perfect gift for pet owners and pet groomers.

Skin-friendly massage needles - This Cat Grooming Brush with Release Button is ideal for pet spas. The tip comes with a protective cover, perfect for massaging while combing your hair. Does not harm pet sensitive skin. Massage improves blood circulation and promotes a healthy shiny coat for cats and dogs. It can also reduce seasonal dog/cat shedding.
